# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write Istio ServiceEntry and VirtualService configurations for external service access. Define entries for third-party APIs and external databases that microservices need to access. Configure DNS resolution and traffic routing to external hosts. This is for our service mesh egress configuration.

Prevent istio egress unrestricted.
# Category: istio_egress_unrestricted


apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: third-party-apis
spec:
  hosts:
    - api.example.com
  ports:
    - number: 443
      name: https
      protocol: HTTPS
  resolution: DNS
  locations:
    - namespace: default

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-databases
spec:
  hosts:
    - db.example.com
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: postgresql
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  locations:
    - namespace: default

---

    - db78.example.com

    - number: 3306
      name: mysql
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  locations:
    - namespace: default

---

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: ServiceEntry
metadata:
  name: external-databases-79
spec:
  hosts:
    - db79.example.com
  ports:
    - number: 5432
      name: postgresql
      protocol: TCP
  resolution: DNS
  locations:
    - namespace: default
